name: FabricatorProfilesAndMaterials
summary: The FabricatorProfilesAndMaterials class contains methods for converting fabricator profiles and materials to Tekla Structures.

methods.name: ConvertSourceFile
methods.signature: public static bool ConvertSourceFile(string profilesFilePath, string dimensionsFilePath)
methods.summary: Converts a fabricator profile catalog source file to an XML file that contains a list of valid Tekla Structures catalog profiles and materials.

params.name: profilesFilePath
params.doc: The path to the fabricator profiles and materials file.

params.name: dimensionsFilePath
params.doc: The path to the fabricator dimensions file.
